content.text:

results.description: Calls at 2 pm and 2 am cost the same.

results.description: Tiered pricing offers increasingly comprehensive packages at different price points. As you climb tiers, the per-minute rate often drops. ... The catch? Complexity. You'll need a spreadsheet to figure out your actual costs. Let's compare what the major players actually charge. Before deciding on hiring a receptionist, it's crucial to understand the cost differences between traditional and virtual receptionists. ... For detailed options, check out Smith.ai pricing plans.

content.text:
{
  "url": "https://smith.ai/pricing/ai-receptionist",
  "finalUrl": "https://smith.ai/pricing/ai-receptionist",
  "status": 200,
  "contentType": "text/html; charset=utf-8",
  "title": "Smith.ai Plans & Pricing for AI Receptionist",
  "extractMode": "markdown",
  "extractor": "readability",
  "truncated": false,
  "length": 7818,
  "fetchedAt": "2026-02-04T01:06:50.374Z",
  "tookMs": 1113,
  "text": "/

## Convert conversations to clients
Win and retain more business with AI-first or human-first call answering, scheduling, and intake.

##### Starter

50 calls
$95 / month

### Basic

150 calls
$270 / month

### Pro

500 calls
$800 / month

### Enterprise

Custom
Ask about enterprise pricing

#### ALL PLANS INCLUDE A 30-DAY MONEY-BACK GUARANTEE, PLUS:

Lead screening, qualification & intake

Live agents available 24/7 (+$3/call)

Rich business insights in your dashboard

No setup fees

No annual contracts

No hidden fees

### What’s in the box?
Core features included in every AI Receptionist plan, no matter your call volume.

##### Included features
CRM integrations
Call details are sent automatically to your CRM or Zapier.
We support HubSpot, Salesforce, Clio, and [many more](/integrations?category=CRM).

Free!

Lead qualification
We’ll capture and qualify your leads based on your custom criteria.
Leads are screened to determine if they are a good fit based on needs, location, and budget.

Free!

New client intake
We’ll ask business-specific intake questions for your qualified leads.
Up to 10 short-answer questions (e.g., case number, car model, dog breed.)

Free!

Call transfers
Set up transfer destinations to efficiently route calls.
Set unique transfer destinations for different caller types.

Free!

Live agent handoff
Our 24/7 Live Agent Network is available on-demand to add a human touch to your choice of call scenarios.
AI taps in live agents at your discretion. Unexpected technical issue? Our system escalates to a live agent for free.

+$3/call

AI Scheduling
AI integrates with Calendly to book appointments directly into your calendar — live on the call.

AI-only scheduling available for integrated calendars. Use live agents to schedule with any calendaring platform that provides a direct link to the appointment.

Free!

Dedicated phone number
A local or toll-free number is given to you, and only you.
You'll have a dedicated number to use for calls. Or port your business number at no charge.

Free!

Call recording & transcription
We’ll automatically record and transcribe all calls.

Includes access to call recordings, searchable transcripts & PII masking. [Learn more.](https://docs.smith.ai/article/fzv1b69n7t-call-recording-transcription-with-smith-ai)

Free!

Answer caller questions
Provide clear, helpful answers to your callers’ most common questions.

Add up to 50 custom Q&A pairs to ensure your callers get the information they need.

Free!

Instant call summaries
Get summaries sent to the tools you already use — email, Slack & Teams.

Respond to leads faster and keep your team informed after every call.

Free!

##### Converts callers into clients
Smith.ai is our inbound sales team. Having a trained and personable voice has transformed our ability to answer the phone and convert callers to clients.

[Read case study](/case-studies/cmit-solutions-downtown-chicago)

##### Frequently asked questions
Our AI answering service costs a little bit more because it does a lot more. Unlike others offering AI that stops at answering basic questions (assuming they even get them right, which most don’t), you can trust us with your business’ reputation. First, we have humans in the loop. With our AI Receptionist, your calls are always handled by our AI first, but if something complex comes up, the call can be transferred to a live North America-based receptionist — any time, day or night. This built-in human backup ensures your callers get the help they need while you never get interrupted. It's the perfect blend of efficiency and reliability. Second, our system is designed specifically to qualify your leads based on our industry-leading experience answering over 20 million calls for businesses in the past 10 years. So yes, it’s a bit pricier than the competition — because we’re committed to making every interaction exceptional.

Every call answered by your AI Receptionist counts toward your call quota by default. Smith.ai offers AI Receptionist customers an allowance to remove up to 10% of their calls from their bill each billing cycle to account for selected spam calls. Calls from 20 million+ known spammers are automatically filtered out by our system before your AI Receptionist answers, and these calls do not count toward your quota. You can learn more about this [here](https://smithaivoiceassistant.freshdesk.com/en/support/solutions/articles/151000219460-how-to-manage-spam-callers).

With technology! Our system automatically blocks over 20 million spam and robocalls from ever getting through. If a new spam number does get through, you can mark it as spam to automatically block the caller and add it to your spam list, so it can’t get through ever again.

No. AI Receptionist is a month-to-month service. This means there aren’t any long-term contracts. You pay for the AI Receptionist service each month. If you ever cancel, we need 30 days' notice, and then you’re done. And we will miss you.

Yes, at any time. We make it easy. If you would like to change your plan, just email [support@smith.ai](mailto:support@smith.ai). We'll start billing for your new plan the next month.

Because unlike per-minute services, our success is aligned with your success. Billing per call means there’s no mystery accounting involved. You’re trusting us to represent your business. We’re optimized for the exact right length of calls, not more or less. Per-minute services work opposite to your needs; they want to maximize your call length while you want to minimize your call time.

Do you want your business to succeed? Well, good. We do, too. A successful business can’t afford to miss a single lead or sales opportunity. (By the time you call them back, they’ve likely found someone else… or if they’re really bad, they’ll leave a negative review because you didn’t answer.) Our AI Receptionist isn’t just another AI; it’s the only one on the market designed specifically for lead qualification and on-demand escalated to Smith.ai's 24/7 Live Agent Network. If your callers need more than our AI can handle, AI Receptionist can immediately transfer them to an experienced live agent at your discretion. No missed calls, no frustrated customers — just flawless support. And here’s the best part: It’s a fraction of the cost of an in-house receptionist, yet it works 24/7 and never takes a lunch break. So, you’re not just paying for an answering service; you’re investing in a solution that’s always on, always reliable, and always working for you.

At Smith.ai we want our services to provide real value for your business and truly take work off your plate. And we want you to be able to fully experience what it’s like to have us on the front lines, risk free. That’s why we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee to all new clients. We get it. Things happen. If you decide Smith.ai isn’t for you in the first two weeks, we’ll refund your initial plan — no strings attached.
To receive your money back, send us your request within 30 days of your subscription date. Please send it via email to [support@smith.ai](mailto:support@smith.ai) with the subject line “Money-Back Request.”
Here are the details:

- New clients of Smith.ai can get their money back on Starter, Basic, Pro, and Custom plans for 30 days.
- If you want to cancel your service for any reason in the first 30 days, you get a refund of your plan and any add-on services, regardless of how many calls or chats you have used, up to $1,000.
- Any calls over your plan quota (“overage”) are not included in the money-back guarantee.

We offer volume discounts and can create a custom plan to suit your high-volume needs. Please [book a free consultation](/booking-air) with our team.

### Take the faster path to growth. Get Smith.ai today.

Affordable plans for every budget."
}

You'll have a dedicated number to use for calls. Or port your business number at no charge.

Free!

Call recording & transcription
We’ll automatically record and transcribe all calls.

Includes access to call recordings, searchable transcripts & PII masking. [Learn more.](https://docs.smith.ai/article/fzv1b69n7t-call-recording-transcription-with-smith-ai)

Free!

Answer caller questions
Provide clear, helpful answers to your callers’ most common questions.

Add up to 50 custom Q&A pairs to ensure your callers get the information they need.

Free!

Instant call summaries
Get summaries sent to the tools you already use — email, Slack & Teams.

Respond to leads faster and keep your team informed after every call.

Free!

##### Converts callers into clients
Smith.ai is our inbound sales team. Having a trained and personable voice has transformed our ability to answer the phone and convert callers to clients.

[Read case study](/case-studies/cmit-solutions-downtown-chicago)

##### Frequently asked questions
Our AI answering service costs a little bit more because it does a lot more. Unlike others offering AI that stops at answering basic questions (assuming they even get them right, which most don’t), you can trust us with your business’ reputation. First, we have humans in the loop. With our AI Receptionist, your calls are always handled by our AI first, but if something complex comes up, the call can be transferred to a live North America-based receptionist — any time, day or night. This built-in human backup ensures your callers get the help they need while you never get interrupted. It's the perfect blend of efficiency and reliability. Second, our system is designed specifically to qualify your leads based on our industry-leading experience answering over 20 million calls for businesses in the past 10 years. So yes, it’s a bit pricier than the competition — because we’re committed to making every interaction exceptional.

Every call answered by your AI Receptionist counts toward your call quota by default. Smith.ai offers AI Receptionist customers an allowance to remove up to 10% of their calls from their bill each billing cycle to account for selected spam calls. Calls from 20 million+ known spammers are automatically filtered out by our system before your AI Receptionist answers, and these calls do not count toward your quota. You can learn more about this [here](https://smithaivoiceassistant.freshdesk.com/en/support/solutions/articles/151000219460-how-to-manage-spam-callers).

With technology! Our system automatically blocks over 20 million spam and robocalls from ever getting through. If a new spam number does get through, you can mark it as spam to automatically block the caller and add it to your spam list, so it can’t get through ever again.

No. AI Receptionist is a month-to-month service. This means there aren’t any long-term contracts. You pay for the AI Receptionist service each month. If you ever cancel, we need 30 days' notice, and then you’re done. And we will miss you.

Yes, at any time. We make it easy. If you would like to change your plan, just email [support@smith.ai](mailto:support@smith.ai). We'll start billing for your new plan the next month.

Because unlike per-minute services, our success is aligned with your success. Billing per call means there’s no mystery accounting involved. You’re trusting us to represent your business. We’re optimized for the exact right length of calls, not more or less. Per-minute services work opposite to your needs; they want to maximize your call length while you want to minimize your call time.

Do you want your business to succeed? Well, good. We do, too. A successful business can’t afford to miss a single lead or sales opportunity. (By the time you call them back, they’ve likely found someone else… or if they’re really bad, they’ll leave a negative review because you didn’t answer.) Our AI Receptionist isn’t just another AI; it’s the only one on the market designed specifically for lead qualification and on-demand escalated to Smith.ai's 24/7 Live Agent Network. If your callers need more than our AI can handle, AI Receptionist can immediately transfer them to an experienced live agent at your discretion. No missed calls, no frustrated customers — just flawless support. And here’s the best part: It’s a fraction of the cost of an in-house receptionist, yet it works 24/7 and never takes a lunch break. So, you’re not just paying for an answering service; you’re investing in a solution that’s always on, always reliable, and always working for you.

At Smith.ai we want our services to provide real value for your business and truly take work off your plate. And we want you to be able to fully experience what it’s like to have us on the front lines, risk free. That’s why we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee to all new clients. We get it. Things happen. If you decide Smith.ai isn’t for you in the first two weeks, we’ll refund your initial plan — no strings attached.
To receive your money back, send us your request within 30 days of your subscription date. Please send it via email to [support@smith.ai](mailto:support@smith.ai) with the subject line “Money-Back Request.”
Here are the details:

- New clients of Smith.ai can get their money back on Starter, Basic, Pro, and Custom plans for 30 days.
- If you want to cancel your service for any reason in the first 30 days, you get a refund of your plan and any add-on services, regardless of how many calls or chats you have used, up to $1,000.
- Any calls over your plan quota (“overage”) are not included in the money-back guarantee.

We offer volume discounts and can create a custom plan to suit your high-volume needs. Please [book a free consultation](/booking-air) with our team.

### Take the faster path to growth. Get Smith.ai today.

Affordable plans for every budget.

results.title: Ruby Receptionist Pricing: Scalable Virtual Support
results.description: Ruby's scalable virtual receptionist plans grow with your business. The most popular plans range from 50 to 500 minutes per month, all with 24/7 coverage and bilingual support.

results.title: Best Answering Services for Small Businesses (2025) – Prices & Reviews
results.description: ... Pricing ‍Ruby offers three virtual receptionist plans ranging from 50 minutes to 500 minutes, with a mid-tier 200-minute plan at $705/month marked as their most popular option.

results.title: Ruby Receptionists Review 2025
results.description: Complete review of Ruby Receptionists with pricing, features, and top alternatives for contractors.

results.title: Best Answering Service Cost Per Month in 2025 | Compare Plans
results.description: For businesses prioritizing a premium communication experience and willing to invest in a high-quality service, Ruby Receptionist offers a compelling solution. Their website (https://www.ruby.com) provides detailed information on their various plans and features, allowing potential customers to assess if the service aligns with their budget and communication requirements. AnswerConnect positions itself as a premium 24/7 live answering service provider, offering virtual receptionists based in the US and UK.

results.title: How much does a call answering service cost
results.description: That’s why we’ve created this quick table to showcase a pricing comparison based on publicly available information from leading live answering service providers as of July 2025 (live plans only). Human live answering services aren’t the only type of answering service, however. AI answering services may seem more affordable at first, but when you factor in missed opportunities, limited flexibility, and poor caller experience, the true value becomes questionable.

results.title: Top 12 Virtual Receptionist Companies for 2026 | Marlie.ai Blog
results.description: Discover the best virtual receptionist companies in 2025. In-depth reviews comparing AI vs. human services, pricing, and features to help you choose.

results.title: Best Virtual Receptionist Pricing in 2025 | Compare Top Providers
results.description: A virtual receptionist offers a cost-effective solution, but choosing the right service requires understanding virtual receptionist pricing structures. This guide compares six popular virtual receptionist providers: Frontdesk, Ruby Receptionists, Davinci Virtual Office Solutions, Smith.ai, Answering Service Care, and Nexa. Breaking down their pricing models to help you make an informed decision in 2025.

results.title: Ruby Receptionists vs AI Receptionist (2025) | Eden
results.description: Ruby Receptionists costs $245-$1,695/month. AI receptionists start at $39/month with unlimited plans at $99. Compare features, pricing, and ROI.

 Ruby gives us exactly what we need as a new business with limited staff. It provides a professional experience for our clients while minimizing the hours needed to man a reception desk.

 Lyssa King

I especially appreciated the clear communication and their willingness to go the extra mile—text alerts, backup call routing, and follow-up were all handled flawlessly. Their service has been reliable and supportive for our clinic operations, and I highly recommend them to any organization looking for dependable answering services.

## Ready to start building your plan?

 Ruby customers typically save over 10 hours a month by letting us handle their calls. Contact us today to learn what results we can deliver for you. A dedicated sales team member will partner with you to craft the ideal plan for your business.

Based on the research, here's what I found for AI and virtual receptionist pricing in 2025:

**AI-First Solutions (Pure AI):**
- My AI Front Desk: $79-149/month (annual billing)
- Various budget AI receptionists: $25-99/month for basic plans
- Mid-range AI solutions: $199-299/month 

**AI + Human Hybrid:**
- Smith.ai: $95-800/month ($95 for 50 calls, $270 for 150 calls, $800 for 500 calls)

**Premium Human-First (with some AI):**
- Ruby Receptionists: $250-1,725/month ($250 for 50 minutes, $395 for 100 minutes, $720 for 200 minutes, $1,725 for 500 minutes)

The user is considering $499/month, which puts them in the premium tier but not at the top end. This seems reasonable given that it's likely positioning as a comprehensive solution.

Let me provide a detailed analysis.

content.text:
Based on my research, **$499/month actually positions you well in the market** - you're not priced out at all. Here's the competitive landscape:

## Current Market Pricing (2025)

**Budget AI-Only Solutions:**
- Basic AI receptionists: $25-99/month
- My AI Front Desk: $79-149/month  
- Various "cheap" AI solutions: $29-199/month

**Premium AI + Human Hybrid:**
- **Smith.ai**: $95-800/month ($270 for 150 calls, $800 for 500 calls)
- Most include human backup when AI can't handle complexity

**Premium Human-First Services:**
- **Ruby Receptionists**: $250-1,725/month ($395 for 100 minutes, $720 for 200 minutes)
- Traditional live answering services: $292-3,000+/month

## Where $499 Fits

Your $499 pricing sits perfectly in the **"premium AI solution"** tier - above basic chatbots but below traditional human services. This suggests you're positioning awe2m8 as:

- More sophisticated than basic AI ($79-149/month)
- Competitive with premium AI+human hybrids ($270-800/month)  
- Much more affordable than pure human services ($720-1,725/month)

## Key Competitors to Review:

**Direct Competitors:**
- [Smith.ai](https://smith.ai/pricing/ai-receptionist) - AI first with human backup
- [My AI Front Desk](https://www.myaifrontdesk.com/pricing) - Pure AI solution
- [Ruby Receptionists](https://www.ruby.com/plans-and-pricing/) - Premium human service

**Research These:**
- AnswerConnect.com - Premium live answering
- Nexa.com - Virtual receptionist services  
- Dialzara.com - AI receptionist platform

## Strategic Positioning

At $499, you're priced as a **premium AI solution** that likely offers:
- More advanced AI capabilities than budget options
- Better integration and customization than basic services
- Professional-grade reliability for serious businesses
- Value proposition vs. $720-1,725/month human services

The pricing suggests you're targeting established local businesses (tradies, medical, real estate) who want premium AI but can't justify $700-1,700/month for human receptionists.

**Bottom line:** $499 is competitively positioned in the premium AI tier. Not too expensive if you can demonstrate clear ROI over cheaper alternatives.
